data.body: S4 (73f5) DONE via held-out TDD: land.py (land/land-status, 10 pinned exit codes, heartbeat-first liveness gate, fallback precedence, config thresholds) + docs/land-contract.md (contract-version 1). 14 tests, full suite 53/53, teeth verified. Pushed #590. Code stack: #588(S2c-fix)->#589(S3)->#590(S4). All autolander CODE built. Remaining: S6 (docs+ADR-0042, no deploy), S5 (4 deploy tasks, needs AWS escalation + live E2E). Kicking off S6 review.
